title: viola alba subsp. alba
intro: Viola alba subsp. alba, also known as the white violet or mountain pansy, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the Violaceae family. The medicinal properties of Viola alba subsp. alba include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as a natural remedy for respiratory problems such as colds and coughs. Viola alba subsp. alba can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
